name: geo-optimizer
description: > Generative Engine Optimization (GEO) — make content rank in AI search answers from ChatGPT, Claude, Perplexity, Gemini, and Google AI Overviews. Audits existing content, rewrites for AI citation, and produces per-engine strategy. Use when asked to "optimize for AI search", "rank in ChatGPT", "GEO audit", "improve AI citations", "rank in Perplexity", "AI Overview optimization", "AI Overview ranking", "LLM SEO", "answer engine optimization", "AEO", "get cited by AI", "GEO", "generative engine op
author: nowork-studio
summary_zh: 专门针对 AI 搜索做内容优化的工具，能审计现有文章并改写，让内容更容易被 ChatGPT、Claude、Perplexity、Gemini 等引用，还会按不同引擎给出策略，适合想在 AI 答案里获得曝光的创作者和运营。
